statement: The trace quadrature interval estimate is closed and leaves a positive transported gamma lower bound.

traceQuadratureInputStatus.label: trace quadrature consistency input
traceQuadratureInputStatus.reason: The interval quadrature theorem bounds the trace-frame quadrature error.

finiteGammaAbsorptionInputStatus.label: finite gamma absorption input
finiteGammaAbsorptionInputStatus.reason: The quadrature error is absorbed by the finite gamma lower bound.

transportedGammaPositiveConsequenceStatu.label: transported gamma positive consequence
transportedGammaPositiveConsequenceStatu.reason: Therefore the transported continuum gamma lower bound is positive.

proof: Import the trace quadrature interval consistency theorem.
Expose only the positive transported gamma lower bound to the continuum theorem.
remainingNumericalGap: The qualitative trace-quadrature consequence is closed, but the current explicit transported gamma lower bound is not positive.
